title: The Threat Narrows
description: On pages 17–17, this part focuses on the threat narrows, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Threat Narrows. Baroque Works’ senior agents are summoned while the Straw Hats and Vivi continue moving through the desert toward the heart of Alabasta’s crisis. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Let's hurry up and get a move on.

summary: This part develops the threat narrows and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
